title: ClientContext
description: Full client context record passed to Aureus RM Copilot commands. Represents a point-in-time snapshot of a client's relationship data, portfolio, and risk profile.

client_id.description: Unique CRM identifier for the client (e.g. CRM-UUID or internal client code).

client_name.description: Full legal name or entity name of the client.

segment.description: Client segment classification used for service tiering and product eligibility.

rm_owner.description: Employee ID or email of the Relationship Manager responsible for this client.

relationship_since.description: Date the client relationship was formally onboarded (ISO 8601 date, YYYY-MM-DD).

aum_band.description: Approximate AUM band in Singapore Dollars (SGD). Used for service-tier and mandate-limit calculations.

risk_profile.description: Client risk tolerance and mandate constraints as assessed in the most recent suitability review.

risk_rating.description: Standardised risk rating from the firm's suitability framework.

max_single_name_pct.description: Maximum allowable weight in a single security as a percentage of total portfolio (0–100).

max_sector_pct.description: Maximum allowable weight in any single sector as a percentage of total portfolio (0–100).

excluded_sectors.description: Sectors explicitly excluded from the client's mandate (e.g. for ESG or personal preference reasons).

excluded_geographies.description: Geographies or countries explicitly excluded from the client's mandate.

suitability_review_date.description: Date of the most recent suitability review (ISO 8601 date).

total_market_value.description: Total portfolio market value in the specified currency.

currency.description: Currency of total_market_value (ISO 4217 code, e.g. SGD, USD).

as_of_date.description: Valuation date for the holdings snapshot (ISO 8601 date).

top_holdings.description: List of top holdings by weight, used for concentration analysis.

geography.description: Primary listing geography or country of revenue (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or region name).

weight_pct.description: Portfolio weight as a percentage of total market value (0–100).

market_value.description: Market value of this holding in portfolio currency.

exposure_breakdown.description: Portfolio exposure summary broken down by sector, geography, and asset class. Values are percentage weights summing to approximately 100.

by_sector.description: Map of sector name to portfolio weight percentage.

by_geography.description: Map of geography/country name to portfolio weight percentage.

by_asset_class.description: Map of asset class name to portfolio weight percentage (e.g. Equities, Fixed Income, Cash, Alternatives).

interaction_history.description: Chronological log of client interactions (calls, meetings, emails) relevant to the current relationship context.

summary.description: Brief RM notes summarising the interaction.

follow_up_pending.description: Whether a follow-up action is still outstanding from this interaction.

follow_up_description.description: Description of the pending follow-up action (if follow_up_pending is true).

active_follow_ups.description: Consolidated list of all open follow-up items across all interactions.

owner.description: RM user or team responsible for this follow-up.

data_as_of.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this client context record was last refreshed.

data_sources.description: List of upstream systems or MCP tools that contributed data to this record (for audit and traceability).
